TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Harry_Barnes, title = Harry_Barnes, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Harry_Barnes} }

S.FORM: Harry Barnes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 7, Harry Barnes, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Harry Barnes sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 7, Harry Barnes, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ħarrj βarnes~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ħarrj βarnes~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
